from PIL import Image
import pytesseract
import os

import cv2

# @ optional: specify Tesseract path if not in PATH
# pytesseract.pytesseract.tesseract_cmd = r"C:\Program Files\Tesseract-OCR\tesseract.exe"

# B Input image
image path = r"path\to\your_image.png" # ® change this path

if not os.path.exists(image_path):
raise FileNotFoundError(f" X Image not found: {image_path}")

B Preprocess image (optional but improves accuracy)
